parameters.sqlQuery: SELECT * FROM `service-desk-472314.coherent_voice_dataset.adsim_products_programming_priceList` ORDER BY ITEMS_ID DESC

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.adsim_products_programming_pricelist (
  ITEMS_ID,
  PRICELIST_ID,
  PRICELIST_NAME,
  PRICELIST_REGISTERDATE,
  PRICELIST_LASTUPDATEDATE,
  PRICELIST_START,
  PRICELIST_END
) VALUES (
  {{ $json["ITEMS_ID"] && $json["ITEMS_ID"] !== "" && !isNaN($json["ITEMS_ID"]) ? parseInt($json["ITEMS_ID"]) : 0 }},
  {{ $json["PRICELIST_ID"] && $json["PRICELIST_ID"] !== "" && !isNaN($json["PRICELIST_ID"]) ? parseInt($json["PRICELIST_ID"]) : 0 }},
  {{ $json["PRICELIST_NAME"] && $json["PRICELIST_NAME"] !== "" && !isNaN($json["PRICELIST_NAME"]) ? parseInt($json["PRICELIST_NAME"]) : 0 }},
  {{ $json["PRICELIST_REGISTERDATE"] && $json["PRICELIST_REGISTERDATE"] !== "" ? "'" + $json["PRICELIST_REGISTERDATE"] + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json["PRICELIST_LASTUPDATEDATE"] && $json["PRICELIST_LASTUPDATEDATE"] !== "" ? "'" + $json["PRICELIST_LASTUPDATEDATE"] + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json["PRICELIST_START"] && $json["PRICELIST_START"] !== "" ? "'" + $json["PRICELIST_START"] + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json["PRICELIST_END"] && $json["PRICELIST_END"] !== "" ? "'" + $json["PRICELIST_END"] + "'" : "NULL" }}
);

DELETE FROM public.adsim_products_programming_pricelist a
USING public.adsim_products_programming_pricelist b
WHERE a.ctid < b.ctid
  AND a.ITEMS_ID = b.ITEMS_ID
  AND a.PRICELIST_ID = b.PRICELIST_ID;
